steps.title: Read the two needed points
steps.content: January 13 is 2 days after January 11, so use $x=2$. January 15 is 4 days after January 11, so use $x=4$. From the scatterplot, the corresponding flight times are $(2,6)$ and $(4,15)$.

steps.title: Fit a line through the two points
steps.content: For average rate of change, you only need the slope between those two points. Put them in a Desmos table and run $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=4.5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The flight time increased by $15-6=9$ hours over $4-2=2$ days, so the average rate of change is $9/2=4.5$ hours per day. The answer is 4.5.
